title: StayPut
body:
# 🧭 StayPut Remixed — Remixed Again

Automatically teleport players back to their **last location in each world** when switching between **Multiverse worlds**.

This is an **extended remix** of the [StayPut Remixed](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/stayput-remixed.69564/) by pmdevita — now fully updated for **Minecraft 1.21.x**, with new commands, improved safety, and complete Paper support.

---

### 🎯 Core Purpose
Instead of sending players to spawn when they switch worlds, **StayPut Remixed** remembers where they were **last in that specific world**, and returns them to that location when they come back.

---

### ✨ Key Features

- 🧭 **World-specific teleport memory** — remember last position per world  
- 🌍 **Seamless Multiverse-Core integration**
- 🔧 **Blacklist management commands**
- 💾 Built-in **SQLite** support — no setup required
- ✅ Optional **MySQL/MariaDB** support for external database storage

---

### 🧪 Commands

**🗂️ Original Commands**
- `/stayput help` — Show help menu  
- `/stayput reload` — Reload configuration  
- `/stayput debug <true/false>` — Toggle debugging  
- `/stayput info` — Show player's stored location info  

**🆕 New Commands**
- `/stayput blacklist <world>` — Add world to teleport blacklist  
- `/stayput blacklistremove <world>` — Remove world from blacklist  
- `/stayput list` — List all blacklisted worlds  

---

### 🔐 Permissions

| Permission         | Description                              | Default |
|--------------------|-------------------------------------------|---------|
| `stayput.use`      | Allows normal StayPut functionality       |  |
| `stayput.admin`    | Access to all admin commands              |  op   |

---

### ✅ Tested With

- ✅ Paper `1.21.8`  
- ✅ Multiverse-Core `5.1.2`  
- ✅ Java `17`, `21`, `23`

---

### ⚠️ Should Work On
- ✅ Spigot `1.21.x`  (expected to work)
- ⚠️ Paper `1.20.x` (not tested but likely compatible)

---

### ❌ Not Supported

- ❌ Bukkit-only servers (uses Paper-specific API features)  
- ❌ Forge servers (not compatible)

---

### ⚠️ Disclaimer

This is an unofficial remix of [**pmdevita’s remix**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/stayput-remixed.69564/) of the original [**StayPut plugin by ZanderVDM**](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/stayput.34848/), which appears to have been abandoned. It has been updated and extended **for compatibility and usability only**.

This version is provided **free of charge** and without any intent to monetize.  
**Please do not attempt to sell, resell, or rebrand this plugin for commercial purposes.**  
All credit for the original concept and implementation belongs to original author.

If the original author returns and wishes this version to be taken down, I will respect that request.
